betConsequenceClauses.economic|military: That bet needed time to convert, but opponent invested in military earlier and pressured before your economy fully paid off.
betConsequenceClauses.military|economic: That timing-forward military bet created pressure windows before opponent's economic investment converted.
betConsequenceClauses.economic-heavy|military-heavy: Both players polarized their spend, and tempo swings around military windows determined who converted first.
betConsequenceClauses.military-heavy|economic-heavy: You front-loaded military value while opponent invested deeper into economy, creating repeated pressure windows.
betConsequenceClauses.balanced|balanced: Both players kept broad allocations, so the gap came from timing windows and engagement outcomes rather than one-sided composition.
betConsequenceClauses.defensive|military: Your defensive allocation reduced immediate losses, but military pressure still dictated the pace of map control.
betConsequenceClauses.military|defensive: Military-forward investment tested defensive scaling and forced value trades before static defenses could fully stabilize.
betConsequenceClauses.economic|economic: Both players leaned economic, so subsequent timing and destruction events did most of the separation work.
betConsequenceClauses.military|military: Both players committed heavily to military, so engagement sequencing and re-max speed drove the outcome.

defaultClauses.economic-heavy: That allocation favored long-run growth, but it needed clean survival windows to convert into sustained military advantage.
defaultClauses.economic: That allocation tilted toward growth and required stable midgame timing to pay off.
defaultClauses.balanced: That allocation kept options open, so timing execution and fight quality became the key separators.
defaultClauses.military: That allocation emphasized tempo and pressure windows over long-run growth.
defaultClauses.military-heavy: That allocation front-loaded immediate combat presence and depended on converting pressure into lasting lead.
defaultClauses.defensive: That allocation traded map tempo for structure-backed stability and efficient defense windows.
